faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Cortlandt typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Cortlandt homes commonly experience infestations from house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. Camel crickets are particularly common in damp basements and crawl spaces, while field crickets often enter homes during fall months seeking warmth.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to cricket problems in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Cortlandt and surrounding Westchester communities. Our rapid response team can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin treatment.

faqs.question: Are your cricket treatments safe for homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-safe and child-safe options during your consultation.
